labels: bug, triage

> Lengkapi semua field di bawah. Bug tanpa info cukup akan dikembalikan ke status `need-info`.
> Klasifikasi severity & priority mengikuti [Bug Triage Matrix](../../docs/qa/BUG-TRIAGE.md).

## Ringkasan

<!-- 1–2 kalimat, plain language -->

## Environment

- **App version / commit**: `vX.Y.Z` atau commit hash
- **Environment**: local / staging / production
- **Browser + version**:
- **OS**:
- **User type**: anonymous / authenticated / Studio creator / admin

## Steps to Reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected Behavior

<!-- Apa yang seharusnya terjadi -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- Apa yang terjadi -->

## Evidence

<!-- Screenshot, GIF, atau log. Minimal 1 evidence. -->

## Frequency

- [ ] Always (100 %)
- [ ] Sometimes (X out of Y)
- [ ] Only once

## Severity (reporter assessment)

- [ ] **S1 Critical** — sistem down, data loss, security
- [ ] **S2 High** — fitur utama broken
- [ ] **S3 Medium** — fitur sekunder broken
- [ ] **S4 Low** — minor / cosmetic

## Workaround (kalau ada)

<!-- Cara user bisa lanjut kerja sementara -->

## Suspect Area

<!-- Kira-kira di area mana bug ini? Boleh kosong. -->

- [ ] Auth
- [ ] Chat
- [ ] Voice
- [ ] Studio
- [ ] Explorer
- [ ] API server
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Deploy / infra
- [ ] Tidak tahu
